Here is my multimedia i have to offer. I would like to thank Jago of Son Gokou's Dragonball Domain and Trunks Domain for the support! Thanks for visiting and enjoy the assortment of MIDIs, MP3s, whatever...Have fun!

Kamehame.mov (Size: 502 kb) - Gokou doing the Kamehameha blast.
Tenshiha.mov (Size: 826 kb) - Tien throwing a fireball at someone.
Thares.mov (Size: 266 kb) - Raditz doing some kind of move.
Trunks3.mov (Size: 1.06 mb) - Trunks fighting some green guy, nice movie.
Mpegs: (*.mpeg)
Dbzintro.mpeg(3,485 Kb) - The intro for Dragonball Z, american version.
Ape3.mpeg(1,087 Kb) - Gokou firing a KameHameAh at some giant ape.
Kuririn.mpeg(947 Kb) - Kuririn beating up a bunch a human, very easily.
Kuririn2.mpeg(1,087 Kb) - Kuririn humiliating himself in a battle with Piccolo.
Metal.mpeg(1,981 Kb) - Gokou fighting Metal Cooler, knocks his arm off, very cool.
Mp3's: (*.mp3)
Dragonballz_opening.mp3(805 Kb) - The theme music for Dragonball Z, american version.
Music5.mp3(1,308 Kb) - A pretty cool song from Dragonball Z or GT, not sure...
Song45.mp3(425 Kb) - "Dan Dan" from Dragonball GT.
Track8.mp3(62 Kb) - "Cool Cool" from the Dragonball Z CD "Never Ending Story."
Track9.mp3(Size: 1.09 mb) - An ok song.
Midi's: (*.mid)
Dbz2.mid(46 Kb) - A pretty cool Midi from Dragonball Z, but I'm not sure what song it is.
Dandan.mid(70 Kb) - "Dan Dan" from Dragonball GT.
Drag
